profile.title: Profile Information
profile.subtitle: Update your personal information
profile.bddkInfo: Used to calculate credit limit according to BDDK limit rules
profile.updatedDesc: Your information has been saved successfully

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.languageChangedDesc: App language has been changed successfully
appearance.appearanceSavedDesc: Your appearance settings have been updated

security.title: Security
security.subtitle: Protect the app with PIN and biometrics
security.appLockDesc: Lock the app with a 6-digit PIN
security.biometricDesc: Use biometric authentication for quick unlock
security.autoLockDesc: App locks automatically when going to background

data.title: Data Management
data.deleteWarning: This action cannot be undone. All your cards, loans, spending history, and settings will be permanently deleted.
data.exportDesc: All your data will be downloaded as a JSON file. You can restore this file on another device.
data.restoreDesc: Select a previously exported JSON backup file to restore your data.
data.resetExplanation: This action cannot be undone. The following data will be permanently deleted:
data.resetFinalWarning: All your data will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone. Do you want to continue?

personalFinance.title: Personal Finance
personalFinance.subtitle: Manage personal finance section visibility
personalFinance.hideToggleDesc: Removes personal finance from the bottom navigation. Turn on if you only want to use family finance.
personalFinance.warning: This setting only affects navigation. Your personal finance data will not be deleted and you can re-enable it anytime.

pin.noHintSet: This PIN was set without a hint. You can add a hint by resetting your PIN in Settings.
pin.resetMessage: You can reset the PIN by reinstalling the app.
pin.resetWarning: This will delete your local data.
pin.resetSyncRecovery: If family sync is active, your data will return when you rejoin. If you have a cloud backup, you can also restore from it.

gemini.title: AI Receipt Scanner
gemini.subtitle: Gemini 2.5 Flash
gemini.description: Scan your receipts much more accurately with Google's AI model. Optional — you can still use device scanning without it.
gemini.howToGetDesc: Go to Google AI Studio → Click 'Create API Key'

cloud.title: Cloud Sync
cloud.subtitle: Back up your data to the cloud and sync across devices
cloud.signedInDesc: Successfully signed in to your account
cloud.signInError: An error occurred while signing in
cloud.hasAccount: Already have an account? Sign in
cloud.backupDoneDesc: Your data has been saved to the cloud
cloud.restoreDoneDesc: Your data has been restored from the cloud
cloud.noBackupDesc: No backup exists in the cloud yet
cloud.syncNote: Your data is stored encrypted and linked to your account.
cloud.privacyNote: Your data is securely stored and linked to your account.
cloud.autoSyncDesc: Your data is automatically backed up to the cloud
cloud.comingSoonDesc: Cloud sync feature will be available soon.
